display.purpose: The hero line only. Fraunces at max scale, sentence case.

headline.purpose: Section headings. Fraunces light (300) at large scale so they read as set.

body.purpose: All reading. Hanken Grotesk at 70% paper opacity, 65-75ch measure.

label.purpose: Rationed eyebrow and case-study tags. Uppercase, wide tracking, sparing.

accent.purpose: The recurring grounded idea. Fraunces italic, solid warm refraction.

motion.name: ease-reveal
motion.purpose: Scroll-reveal enters (GSAP power3.out equivalent). Ease-out, never bounce.

motion.name: ease-ui
motion.purpose: Hover and state transitions on nav, buttons, links.

motion.name: lenis-scroll
motion.purpose: Lenis momentum easing for the whole-page smooth scroll.

motion.name: crystal-damp
motion.purpose: Cursor-follow damping on the crystal. Never snaps.

components.name: Hero Primary CTA
components.description: The one clearly-clickable object in the hero. Paper fill, ink text, full pill.
components.css: .ds-cta-primary { display: inline-block; background: #F5F3EF; color: #0B0B0F; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 0.75rem 1.5rem; font-family: 'Hanken Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.32,0.72,0,1); } .ds-cta-primary:hover { background: #FFFFFF; } .ds-cta-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #C9A24B; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Nav CTA
components.description: Ghost pill in the nav that inverts to a paper fill on hover. Single contact-intent label.
components.css: .ds-nav-cta { display: inline-block; background: transparent; color: #F5F3EF; border: 1px solid rgba(245,243,239,0.25); border-radius: 9999px; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; font-family: 'Hanken Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.32,0.72,0,1), color 0.3s, border-color 0.3s; } .ds-nav-cta:hover { background: #F5F3EF; color: #0B0B0F; border-color: #F5F3EF; } .ds-nav-cta:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #C9A24B; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Underline Link
components.description: Secondary action / contact link. Paper text, gold-tinted underline that fills to gold on hover.
components.css: .ds-link { color: #F5F3EF; font-family: 'Hanken Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; text-decoration: underline; text-decoration-color: rgba(201,162,75,0.5); text-underline-offset: 8px; transition: text-decoration-color 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.32,0.72,0,1); } .ds-link:hover { text-decoration-color: #C9A24B; } .ds-link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #C9A24B; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Italic Accent
components.description: The recurring grounded through-line. Fraunces italic, solid warm refraction. No gradient.
components.html: The kind of work that could only come from here.
components.css: .ds-accent-line { color: #F5F3EF; font-family: 'Fraunces', Georgia, serif; font-weight: 300; font-size: 2rem; line-height: 1.15; letter-spacing: -0.02em; } .ds-accent { font-style: italic; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.1; color: #E8A15C; }

components.name: Refraction Divider
components.description: The signature section divider: a 1px cool-to-warm refraction hairline. Replaces every grey rule.
components.css: .ds-rule { position: relative; height: 1px; width: 100%; background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent 0%, color-mix(in oklab, #6C7BD6 55%, transparent) 28%, color-mix(in oklab, #F5F3EF 30%, transparent) 50%, color-mix(in oklab, #E8A15C 55%, transparent) 72%, transparent 100%); }

components.name: Case-study Visual Slot
components.description: Placeholder frame for real case-study imagery. Thin border, faint cool-to-warm inner wash. Not a decorative card.
components.css: .ds-visual { position: relative; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; aspect-ratio: 3 / 2; border: 1px solid rgba(245,243,239,0.1); border-radius: 2px; overflow: hidden; } .ds-visual::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(108,123,214,0.1), transparent, rgba(232,161,92,0.1)); } .ds-visual span { position: relative; font-family: 'Hanken Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.7rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.2em; color: rgba(245,243,239,0.3); }

narrative.overview: The whole system is refraction. Colour never arrives as a painted surface; it arrives as bent light passing through glass. A hand-coded crystal idles in the hero, spilling warm and cool light down into a deep, quiet page, and that same light logic recurs everywhere: dividers are a cool-to-warm spectrum hairline, Work carries a cool glow, Contact warms toward the end of the spectrum. The room is grounded and warm, never clinical. This system spends its boldness exactly once: the crystal is the single loud element and earns a whole viewport; everything below stays disciplined, dark, and typographic so the work stays the picture and the 3D stays the frame.
keyCharacteristics: Colour is refraction, never paint. Ink and paper carry 95% of every surface.
One bold moment (the crystal); everything else is quiet.
Fraunces used sparingly for display; Hanken Grotesk carries all reading.
Flat by default: depth is light and tonal wash, never a drop shadow.
Everything eases. No linear motion, no snapping, anywhere.

rules.name: The Bent-Light Rule
rules.body: Colour enters only as refraction: the crystal's spill, the cool-to-warm divider, the section washes. No flat colour fills on surfaces.

rules.name: The One-Gold Rule
rules.body: Gold is a mark, never a field. Links, focus ring, at most one accented CTA. Never a heading or panel fill.

rules.name: The One-Gradient Rule
rules.body: Exactly one gradient exists on the page: the hero accent line. Everywhere else the accent is solid warm. Gradient text is otherwise prohibited.

rules.name: The Italic Through-Line Rule
rules.body: The one idea the page is about is always Fraunces italic, same family and treatment every time, so the eye learns it.

rules.name: The No-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Surfaces never lift on a drop shadow. Depth is light (a wash) or space, never elevation.

dos: Do treat every colour as refraction; ink and paper own 95% of every surface.
Do ease everything (power-out curves, Lenis momentum).
Do keep Ghana Gold to small marks only: links, focus ring, one CTA.
Do set the recurring grounded idea in Fraunces italic, solid warm.
Do ship real ACE work or a credible canvas/WebGL scene in the visual slots.
Do hide the decorative canvas from assistive tech and keep real text and meta/OG in the DOM.
Do ship a lighter or still crystal on mobile / low-power devices, and honor prefers-reduced-motion.
donts: Don't build the generic dark-SaaS agency template: near-black + one accent + three identical feature cards + a tiny uppercase eyebrow over every section.
Don't use corporate stock photography or drop a colored block where a real case-study image belongs.
Don't drift into cold Swiss / grid minimalism, austere and emotionally flat.
Don't add any box-shadow. Depth is light, never elevation.
Don't paint a surface with colour, or fill a heading with gold.
Don't use gradient text anywhere except the single hero accent line.
Don't snap or use linear motion, and don't let the crystal bury the work.
